_description: Synthetic PancakeSwap V3 sandwich on BSC WBNB/USDT pool. MEV bot front-runs victim on a PancakeSwap V3 pool, which emits a Swap event with 2 extra protocol fee params (different topic0 from UniV3). Three PancakeSwap V3 Swap events: front (attacker buys WBNB) + victim (buys WBNB at degraded price) + back (attacker sells WBNB for profit). Expected: sandwich_mev_v1 fires with confidence >= 0.55.
_source: Synthetic — constructed from PancakeSwap V3 pool mechanics (IPancakeV3PoolEvents.sol, fetched 2026-04-24 via WebFetch). PancakeSwap V3 Swap event has 2 extra params (protocolFeesToken0/1) vs UniV3, producing topic0 0x554ac0509f65714ac7759cbb0a25bac77a3292af1d2bafe87e73f72a31b81bde.
_reference: Daian et al. 2019 (Flash Boys 2.0), arXiv:1904.05234; Chi, He, Hu & Wang 2024, arXiv:2405.17944
_adr_note: ADR 0003 carve-out: synthetic fixture. No live BSC RPC required. Fixture created 2026-04-24.
_fixture_note: Swap amounts use SwapRow conventions (amount_in_raw, amount_out_raw) as stored in the swaps table. The dex field uses 'pancake_v3' to denote PancakeSwap V3 pool. The attacker profit = back.amount_out_raw - front.amount_in_raw = 5.08e18 - 5e18 = 0.08e18 raw WBNB units.

swaps._comment: Front-run: MEV bot buys WBNB with USDT on PancakeSwap V3 pool
Victim: buys WBNB at degraded price
Back-run: MEV bot sells WBNB back for profit

_notes: Differs from UniV3 Swap topic0 (0xc42079f94a6350d7e6235f29174924f928cc2ac818eb64fed8004e115fbcca67) due to extra protocolFeesToken0/1 params.
Pool address 0x36696169c63e42cd08ce11f5deeebbcebae652050 is the real WBNB/USDC PancakeSwap V3 pool (BSCscan verified).
Fixture uses SwapRow format (already-decoded data from swaps table), not raw ABI log bytes.
Profit: back.amount_out_raw - front.amount_in_raw = 5.08e18 - 5e18 = 0.08e18 USDT raw units.
Created 2026-04-24 as synthetic fixture (no live BSC RPC required).
